About Us

Durga Prasad is a renowned astrologer and psychic based in Taxes, USA, with over 25 years of experience. He provides guidance for love, marriage, career, and business challenges. Specializing in reuniting lost love, resolving conflicts, removing negative energies, and protecting from black magic, Durga Prasad delivers powerful solutions that bring peace, harmony, and prosperity.

Guidance You Can Trust

Find clear answers about durga Prasad trusted services and guidance in this helpful FAQ section.

Q1 How can astrology help in making life decisions?

Astrology provides clarity by revealing life patterns and opportunities, guiding you to make confident, informed, and spiritually aligned decisions.

Q2: Can astrology accurately predict your future?

Astrology offers deep insights into your life path, personality, and upcoming opportunities based on planetary movements. 

Q3:Can I trust that these remedies are safe and natural?

Yes, absolutely. All remedies provided by Astrologer Durga Prasad are completely safe, natural, and based on traditional Vedic practices.

Q4:Can I consult Durga Prasad online?

Yes, you can easily consult Astrologer Durga Prasad online from anywhere in the world. He offers video and phone consultations for your convenience.

Q5:Which information is necessary for an effective ritual?

For the best and most accurate results, Astrologer Durga Prasad requires your full name, date of birth, time of birth, and place of birth.
